title: achnatherum altum
intro: Achnatherum altum, also known as the high altitude bunchgrass, is a species of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Achnatherum altum has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
